Become one with the Mists and gain the following:
• The "Fractal Champion" title
• 5 agony resistance, 2%% increased outgoing damage, and 25 health per second in fractals for every character in your account
• 1 additional fractal encryption and bag of fractal relics from the final chest in every fractal
Level 3 of 4—Effects stack with previous level.

Become one with the Mists and gain the following:
• The "Fractal God" title
• 5 agony resistance, 3%% increased outgoing damage, and 50 health per second in fractals for every character in your account
• 1 additional fractal encryption and bag of fractal relics from the final chest in every fractal
Level 4 of 4—Effects stack with previous level.

Become one with the Mists and gain the following:
• The "Fractal Prodigy" title
• 5 agony resistance, 1%% increased outgoing damage, and 15 health per second in fractals for every character in your account
• 1 additional fractal encryption and bag of fractal relics from the final chest in every fractal
Level 2 of 4—Effects stack with previous level.

Become one with the Mists and gain the following:
• The "Fractal Savant" title
• 5 agony resistance, 1%% increased outgoing damage, and 10 health per second in fractals for every character in your account
• 1 additional fractal encryption and bag of fractal relics from the final chest in every fractal
